title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Aloe barbadensis essential oils contains biologically active constituents like aloin, aloe-emodin, and acemannan. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, a common issue in ulcerative colitis. Aloe-emodin, in particular, has been shown to have a protective effect on the gut lining, preventing damage and promoting healing.
